message:
chore(tests): check in proptest regression seeds for ART and interval tree

Add proptest-generated failure case seeds for the adaptive radix tree and
interval tree property tests. These files record the minimal shrunk
inputs that previously triggered failures, ensuring those specific edge
cases are re-tested on every run before any new random cases are
generated.

Seeds captured:
- adaptive_radix_tree: 2 regression cases — one exercising n=49 node
  splitting and one hitting an empty-pairs edge case at boundary 0/1
- interval_tree: 1 regression case — single-interval insertion with
  narrow range (429..501) exposing an augmentation update bug

Proptest documentation explicitly recommends checking these files into
source control so all contributors benefit from previously discovered
failure cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc b3c1fc05c61a2f0183d84dd26fb28289ea05b04a2765ff87e26808fab884191d # shrinks to n = 49
+cc 54923db13763e087cdd56086b687c09071b086771488ef159fddcfe26007cb81 # shrinks to pairs = [([], 0), ([], 1)]

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 1f874af39f2b78f6a7d94687a251dfaac91cf57ba422acacf75ee58c7f9e5b9e # shrinks to intervals = [(Interval { low: 429, high: 501 }, 0)]
